text: 📚 Term 3 Enrollments are now OPEN! Elevate confidence and grades in Maths, Science, and English for the second half of the school year.
❄️ LearnLoom Winter Vacation Programs: Creative writing, Math Olympiad prep, and Art camps running June 29 – July 10, 2026!
🚀 Selective School & Scholarship Exam Prep: Intensive preparation workshops for Years 6 & 8 start this July. Boost your score!
🏆 ICAS Competitions 2026: Get ready for the upcoming August ICAS Maths, English, and Science assessments with our targeted practice runs.
🏅 Australian Mathematics Competition (AMC) Prep: Join our advanced analytical problem-solving workshops throughout July & August.
✍️ LearnLoom Flash Fiction Challenge: Showcase your writing creativity this July and win premium learning gear!
🎨 Creative drawing, painting, and craft workshops open for holiday bookings. Spark your child's imagination!
✨ Try before you decide. Book a FREE 1-on-1 personalized demo class with a LearnLoom coordinator today.
💬 Connect with us on WhatsApp for 24/7 student support, lesson scheduling, and parent updates.
